test.notes: No test command is defined in .factory/services.yaml or the root package.json, and the mission guidance for this refactoring milestone says no E2E tests are needed.

typecheck.notes: Per mission AGENTS.md, root type checking is validated through the build pipeline rather than a separate tsc command; this validation run completed successfully.

lint.notes: Lint exited 0 with warnings only across @documenso/trpc, @documenso/ui, and @documenso/lib; no errors blocked the milestone validators in this run.

blockingIssues.description: packages/ui/primitives/document-flow/field-item-advanced-settings.tsx deletes the legacy field_* localStorage key without first reading and migrating it, so existing unsaved advanced-settings drafts are lost on first load after deployment instead of being handled gracefully.

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/client-side-data-fetching.md documenting versioned localStorage migration expectations, the concrete field-meta schema pair for persisted field-meta objects, and the shared resize-listener singleton hook pattern plus remaining intentionally separate resize listeners.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a client-storage persistence guideline: when versioning localStorage keys, read and validate the new key first, then explicitly migrate or honor legacy unversioned values before deleting them.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The client-localstorage-schema review found that apps/remix/app/components/general/verify-email-banner.tsx:69-91 and packages/ui/primitives/document-flow/field-item-advanced-settings.tsx:172-199 both introduced versioned keys, but the advanced-settings path dropped existing legacy drafts instead of migrating them. The mission AGENTS.md currently contains no browser-storage guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand VAL-CLIENT-002 so it explicitly requires preserving or migrating valid legacy localStorage values during schema versioning, not just adding a versioned key and validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: VAL-CLIENT-002 currently says the two localStorage usages should include a version key and validation, while the feature description also required graceful handling of old data. That gap allowed client-localstorage-schema to pass the contract wording while still regressing stored drafts and dialog cooldown timestamps.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce that narrowly scoped refactors should avoid incidental formatter-only or Tailwind class-order churn, or split that noise into a separate change before finishing the feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The client-passive-listeners review found unrelated class-ordering hunks in packages/ui/primitives/multiselect.tsx and packages/ui/components/document/envelope-recipient-field-tooltip.tsx bundled into commit beff112d6ac22843ad82192390535c7abecef9c5 alongside the real passive-listener changes.
